query: SELECT code, name, value FROM pricingConfig WHERE code IN ('MUEBLE_INFERIOR_ML', 'MUEBLE_SUPERIOR_ML');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT code, name, value FROM pricingConfig WHERE code IN ('MUEBLE_INFERIOR_ML', 'MUEBLE_SUPERIOR_ML');
stdout:
code	name	value
MUEBLE_INFERIOR_ML	Mueble Inferior - Metro Lineal	900000.00
MUEBLE_SUPERIOR_ML	Mueble Superior - Metro Lineal	750000.00
